prescription_label.instructions: 2 pills in the morning and cerotes alo pitts at bedtime

inferred_illnesses.name: Schizophrenia/Psychotic Disorder
inferred_illnesses.reasoning: Paliperidone (similar antipsychotic) is used to treat schizophrenia and schizoaffective disorder.
inferred_illnesses.management: Regular medication adherence, regular psychiatric monitoring, avoid alcohol, maintain social support, manage side effects.

inferred_illnesses.name: Bipolar Disorder
inferred_illnesses.reasoning: May be used as adjunctive therapy in bipolar disorder for mood stabilization.
inferred_illnesses.management: Monitor mood changes, maintain consistent sleep schedule, avoid triggers, attend therapy, regular medication adherence.

inferred_illnesses.name: Major Depressive Disorder with Psychotic Features
inferred_illnesses.reasoning: Antipsychotics may be added to antidepressants for severe depression with psychosis.
inferred_illnesses.management: Continue antidepressants, psychotherapy, regular psychiatric follow-up, lifestyle modifications.
